mechanism_narrative: A 5% YoY growth in real GDP signals strong demand conditions that drive positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods of strong real GDP growth are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 10% YoY decline in industrial production signals weak supply conditions that drive negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods of weak industrial production are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 50-bps increase in the federal funds rate signals a tightening monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in tightening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 0.5% YoY decline in the unemployment rate signals strong labor market conditions that drive positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods of strong labor market conditions are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 10% YoY growth in real GDP and a 5% YoY growth in housing starts signal strong demand conditions that drive positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods of strong real GDP growth and housing starts are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 10% YoY decline in industrial production and a 5% YoY decline in housing starts signal weak supply conditions that drive negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods of weak industrial production and housing starts are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 50-bps increase in the federal funds rate and a 10% YoY decline in real GDP signal a tightening monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in tightening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 0.5% YoY decline in the unemployment rate and a 10% YoY growth in real GDP signal strong labor market conditions that drive positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods of strong labor market conditions are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
